# kubefu_flux_source_toolkit_fluxcd_io_oci_repository_v1beta2 (Data Source)

OCIRepository is the Schema for the ocirepositories API



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `metadata` (Map of String)
- `spec` (Map of String) OCIRepositorySpec defines the desired state of OCIRepository
- `status` (Map of String) OCIRepositoryStatus defines the observed state of OCIRepository

### Read-Only

- `api_version` (String) APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

In CamelCase. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds
